response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the video to determine the structure. Intro sequence from 00:00 to 02:49 contains conversational audio only. 2. Musical performance starts at 02:49. Song title 'サマーチョコレート' (Summer Chocolate) detected on-screen. 3. Identified original artist as ≠ME and performers in the video as Yuzuki Choco and Yukihana Lamy. 4. Searched for lyrics using query: '"サマーチョコレート" ≠ME Japanese and English lyrics'. 5. Compiled the lyrics and structured the JSON response.
response.global_summary: The video features a chat and intro segment followed by a 2-person performance of the song "Summer Chocolate" (サマーチョコレート) by VTubers Yuzuki Choco and Yukihana Lamy.

scenes.description: Three VTubers (Yuzuki Choco, Yukihana Lamy, Shirogane Noel) engage in conversation.
Yuzuki Choco and Yukihana Lamy perform the song 'Summer Chocolate'. Text for the song title appears on-screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Summer Chocolate
Melting, sticky, baby
Melting away, Catch me, darling
Pure, pure, cocoa, fluffily, swirling, swirling
One, two!

Something makes me not able to sleep tonight, let's take a walk
Special party time
Just the two of us (Yay!)

If you turn at that corner
It's a park with only benches
Getting lost in the humid air
Convenience store, let's make a little detour (buying things)
Not ice cream, I want this
Canned alcohol, feeling tipsy
Strong with a wink!
Can't get drunk on liqueur anymore
Crush it with love (please)
Sugar

Drink it up, because I'm a person with quirks
Because I'm a Summer Chocolate chosen by you

(Lyrics represent a general translation of the original Japanese text)
